result: Created ipc-contract.ts (IPC handler contract + typed invoke/send wrappers + bridge type derivation). Modified preload/index.ts to use typed wrappers. Modified preload/types.ts to derive ElectronAPI from contract. Typecheck passes with zero errors in changed files. 91/92 tests pass (pre-existing failure).

Applied 4 critic fixes: (1) Fixed channel coverage assertion — replaced `as` bypass with compile-time type error, (2) Fixed OPEN_PATH return type — Promise<void> → Promise<string | void>, (3) Changed `as never` to `as unknown as T` in typedInvoke, (4) Unexported BridgeHandleMap/BridgeSendMap — internal implementation details. All fixes verified: typecheck passes, tests pass.
